hero.title: ODS to XLSX
hero.subtitle: Convert OpenOffice spreadsheets to Excel format.

features.title: OpenDocument compatibility
features.text: Converts ODS to Excel without losing basic data.

about_formats: ODS is the OpenDocument Spreadsheet format.
XLSX is Microsoft's spreadsheet format used in Excel.

faq.question: Are formulas preserved?
faq.answer: Most formulas are preserved but complex macros are not supported.
